metodos.codigoOriginal:
If ThisForm.Opt_Tipo.Value = 1
	Report form SigReCPM Preview NoConsole
Else
	Report form SigReC2P Preview NoConsole
EndIf

Local lcEmps, ldDtIni, ldDtFim, lcOpera, lcContaO, lcContaD, lnNumesI, lnNumesF, lnNops, lcGrOr, lcGrDs, lnPesos, lnPeso2s, lnQtd
Private pDtI, pDtF

lcEmps    = Thisform.getEmpresa.Value
lcEmpDesc = ThisForm.getDEmpresa.Value
ldDtIni   = Thisform.getDtInicial.Value
ldDtFim   = Thisform.getDtFinal.Value
lcOpera   = Thisform.getOperacao.Value
lcContaO  = Thisform.getContaO.Value
lcContaD  = Thisform.getContaD.Value
lnNumesI  = Thisform.GetOperaçăoI.Value
lnNumesF  = Thisform.GetOperaçăoF.Value
ln... [TRUNCADO]

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		=DoDefault()
	Else
		=Messagebox('Impossivel Efetuar Conexăo com Servidor de Banco de Dados...', 0+48, 'CreateObject')
		Return .f.
	EndIf
EndWith

With ThisForm
	.cntAguarde.Visible = .F.
	.GetDtInicial.Value = Date()
	.GetDtFinal.Value   = Date()
	.Refresh
EndWith

If ThisForm.Opt_Tipo.Value = 1
	Report form SigReCPM To Printer Prompt NoConsole		
Else
	Report form SigReC2P To Printer Prompt NoConsole
EndIf
Return Empty(ThisForm.getContaO.Value)

Grupo = ''
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Grupo, [D], This.Value, ThisForm.getContaO, ThisForm.getDContaO)
		=Messagebox([Acesso Negado!!!], 0+48, [Checagem de Acesso])
		ThisForm.getContaO.Value  = []
		ThisForm.getDContaO.Value = []
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.getContaO.Value  = []
	ThisForm.getDContaO.Value = []
EndIf
ThisForm.getContaO.Refresh
ThisForm.getDContaO.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return Empty(ThisForm.getEmpresa.Value)
=fAcessoEmpresa(Usuar, [D], This.Value, ThisForm.getEmpresa, ThisForm.getDEmpresa)
=fAcessoEmpresa(Usuar, [C], This.Value, ThisForm.getEmpresa, ThisForm.getDEmpresa)

Grupo = ''
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Grupo, [C], This.Value, ThisForm.getContaO, ThisForm.getDContaO)
		=Messagebox([Acesso Negado!!!], 0+48, [Checagem de Acesso])
		ThisForm.getContaO.Value  = []
		ThisForm.getDContaO.Value = []
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.getContaO.Value  = []
	ThisForm.getDContaO.Value = []
EndIf
ThisForm.getContaO.Refresh
ThisForm.getDContaO.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return Empty(ThisForm.getContaD.Value)

Grupo = ''
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Grupo, [D], This.Value, ThisForm.getContaD, ThisForm.getDContaD)
		=Messagebox([Acesso Negado!!!], 0+48, [Checagem de Acesso])
		ThisForm.getContaD.Value  = []
		ThisForm.getDContaD.Value = []
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.getContaD.Value  = []
	ThisForm.getDContaD.Value = []
EndIf
ThisForm.getContaD.Refresh
ThisForm.getDContaD.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Grupo = ''
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Grupo, [C], This.Value, ThisForm.getContaD, ThisForm.getDContaD)
		=Messagebox([Acesso Negado!!!], 0+48, [Checagem de Acesso])
		ThisForm.getContaD.Value  = []
		ThisForm.getDContaD.Value = []
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.getContaD.Value  = []
	ThisForm.getDContaD.Value = []
EndIf
ThisForm.getContaD.Refresh
ThisForm.getDContaD.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return Empty(ThisForm.getGrOrigem.Value)

If Not Empty(this.Value)
	=fAcessoContab(Usuar, 'D', This.Value, ThisForm.getGrOrigem, ThisForm.getDsGrOrigem)
Else
	ThisForm.getGrOrigem.Value = ''
	ThisForm.getGrOrigem.refresh
EndIf

* Fim **************************************************************************************

If Not Empty(this.Value)
	=fAcessoContab(Usuar, 'C', This.Value, ThisForm.getGrOrigem, ThisForm.getDsGrOrigem)
Else
	ThisForm.getDsGrOrigem.Value = ''
	ThisForm.getDsGrOrigem.refresh
EndIf

* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return Empty(ThisForm.getGrDestino.Value)

If Not Empty(this.Value)
	=fAcessoContab(Usuar, 'D', This.Value, ThisForm.getGrDestino, ThisForm.getDsGrDestino)
Else
	ThisForm.getGrDestino.Value = ''
	ThisForm.getGrDestino.refresh
EndIf

* Fim **************************************************************************************

If Not Empty(this.Value)
	=fAcessoContab(Usuar, 'C', This.Value, ThisForm.getGrDestino, ThisForm.getDsGrDestino)
Else
	ThisForm.getDsGrDestino.Value = ''
	ThisForm.getDsGrDestino.refresh
EndIf

* Fim **************************************************************************************

If !IsEmpty( This.Value ) And IsEmpty( ThisForm.GetOperaçăof.Value )
	ThisForm.GetOperaçăof.Value = This.Value
	ThisForm.GetOperaçăof.Refresh
Endif
